name: @harness/web-client
description: ISSUE-087 — the per-client deployment Next.js App-Router app (ADR-001 §7: each client deployment is one Next.js service). Mounts the @harness/web-shared shell with the CLIENT_NAV, wires the Supabase server-side session, and renders every client surface into the RBAC-gated shell. No client_slug here (isolation is by deployment, not a column).
